mapper.select: SELECT ORG_ID AS orgId, MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, MESSAGE_FIELD_ID AS messageFieldId, MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME AS messageFieldName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, DATA_TYPE AS dataType, DATA_LENGTH AS dataLength, "SCALE" AS scale, ALIGN AS align, FILLER AS filler, REMARK AS remark, LOG_YN AS logYn, DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, FIELD_REPEAT_CNT AS fieldRepeatCnt FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
